caption: A news broadcast from "plustv" features a split-screen presentation focusing on political commentary. On the left side of the screen, a blue graphics panel titled "ON THE PHONE" identifies "OLUSOLA OYEKANMI" as a "POLITICAL ANALYST" based in "LAGOS," accompanied by a small portrait of the analyst. To the right, video footage shows Bola Tinubu wearing a traditional light-colored tunic and a red cap, standing outdoors with other people in the background. A purple banner across the bottom reads "PLUS POLITICS" above a larger headline that states "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU." The bottom of the screen displays a "SUBSCRIBE" call to action with the web address "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA" and "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA LIFESTYLE." Social media icons and channel information for "DStv CH 408" and "StarTimes CH 308" appear in the final moments. The visual elements remain consistent across the sequence, showing Tinubu speaking while the graphics remain static.
